name: Bagpipes of Turmoil (Major)
description:
While those who appreciate bagpipes may like the sound of this gray reed and black leather instrument, its real purpose is to sow turmoil against a performer's enemies, spreading discord with each note. While playing the bagpipes, you gain a +2 item bonus to Performance checks and to Intimidation checks made to .

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from this instrument to cast a spell from its list.

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
